prose:
Water frontier-orbital energies and gap — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz`, fixed geometry (not optimized). SCF converged in 7 cycles.

HOMO = −8.6037 eV
LUMO = +0.33695 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap ≈ **8.94067 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).

No warnings were reported.
